description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved brentuximab vedotin for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of adult patients with CD30+ Hodgkins Lymphoma (HL) at increased risk of relapse or progression following an autologous hematopoietic stem cell transplant (ASCT).

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

indication.indication: Treatment of adult patients with CD30+ Hodgkins Lymphoma (HL) at increased risk of relapse or progression following an autologous haematopoietic stem cell transplant (ASCT).
